VisualProvenance.notes: The visible ocean is owned by ocean.visual; this collider must not synthesize fallback geometry.
Wind is simulation-only and must not synthesize fallback geometry.
Rendering is owned by aircraft.visual; the physics parent must not synthesize a blue fallback mesh.
